## ARK Invest buys SPCX during price weakness while continuing to reduce AMD holdings

ARK's opposing moves — buying SPCX weakness and trimming AMD — telegraph relative institutional conviction; for AMD holders, persistent selling from a high-visibility fund is a sentiment data point worth monitoring alongside the fundamental competitive landscape.

- ARK reportedly purchased SPCX shares during the stock's recent dip
- Simultaneously, ARK continued offloading AMD shares per coverage
- Medium classifier confidence; single Benzinga outlet, ARK flows as a public sentiment proxy
- No specific share counts or dollar amounts stated in headline
